May satisfy more than one requirement. See www.gened.umd.edu

** Students are required to complete CMSC131 prior to taking CMSC132

unless they have AP credit for CMSC131 (5 on the JAVA A exam, 4 or 5 on the JAVA AB)

or have satisfactorily passed the Computer Science exemption exam.
